content.json:
# Defender XDR Admin Role Change Monitoring

Tracks admin role changes across three sources: Entra directory roles (RoleManagement), Microsoft 365 delegated permission grants, and Defender XDR Unified RBAC (URBAC) custom roles/assignments. Highlights high-risk, permanent (non-PIM), and external/guest activity.

content.query:
let d = fxdr_role_changes_normalized({TimeRange});
union
 (d | summarize Value=count() | extend Name="Total changes", o=1),
 (d | summarize Value=countif(RiskLevel == "High") | extend Name="High-risk", o=2),
 (d | summarize Value=countif(Operation contains "outside of PIM") | extend Name="Permanent (non-PIM)", o=3),
 (d | summarize Value=countif(ActorUPN contains "#EXT#" or TargetIdentity contains "#EXT#") | extend Name="External / guest", o=4),
 (d | summarize Value=countif(Provider == "DefenderXDR") | extend Name="URBAC role ops", o=5)
| order by o asc
| project Name, Value
content.title: Key indicators — Last {TimeRange}

content.query:
fxdr_role_changes_normalized({TimeRange})
| summarize Changes=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d), RiskLevel
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Role changes over time — Last {TimeRange}

content.query:
fxdr_role_changes_normalized({TimeRange})
| summarize TotalChanges=count(), HighRiskChanges=countif(RiskLevel == "High"), DistinctActors=dcount(ActorUPN), DistinctTargets=dcount(TargetIdentity) by Provider
| order by HighRiskChanges desc
content.title: Role Change Summary — Last {TimeRange} (select a row to see the changes)

content.query:
fxdr_role_changes_normalized({TimeRange})
| where "{SelectedProvider}" == "" or Provider == "{SelectedProvider}"
| project TimeGenerated, Provider, Operation, RoleName, Actor, ActorUPN, TargetIdentity, RiskLevel, Result
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Role Change Details — Last {TimeRange}

content.query:
fxdr_role_changes_normalized({TimeRange})
| summarize Changes=count() by Actor
| top 10 by Changes desc
content.title: Top actors — Last {TimeRange}

content.query:
fxdr_role_changes_normalized({TimeRange})
| where RoleName != "Unknown"
| summarize Changes=count() by RoleName
| top 10 by Changes desc
content.title: Top roles — Last {TimeRange}

content.query:
fxdr_role_changes_normalized({TimeRange})
| summarize Changes=count() by Operation
| top 15 by Changes desc
content.title: Operations breakdown — Last {TimeRange}

content.query:
fxdr_role_changes_normalized({TimeRange})
| where ActorUPN contains "#EXT#" or TargetIdentity contains "#EXT#"
| project TimeGenerated, Provider, Operation, RoleName, Actor, ActorUPN, TargetIdentity, RiskLevel
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: External / guest accounts in role changes — Last {TimeRange}

content.query:
fxdr_role_changes_normalized({TimeRange})
| where Operation contains "outside of PIM"
| project TimeGenerated, Provider, Operation, RoleName, Actor, ActorUPN, TargetIdentity, RiskLevel
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Permanent (non-PIM) privileged grants — Last {TimeRange}

content.query:
fxdr_role_changes_normalized({TimeRange})
| where Provider == "DefenderXDR"
| extend RoleDefId = tostring(todynamic(AdditionalData).RoleDefinitionId)
| extend Permissions = todynamic(AdditionalData).AddedRolePermission
| join kind=leftouter (_GetWatchlist("urbac-role-names") | project WLId=tostring(column_ifexists("RoleDefinitionId", "")), WLName=tostring(column_ifexists("RoleName", ""))) on $left.RoleDefId == $right.WLId
| extend RoleName = coalesce(WLName, strcat("URBAC role ", RoleDefId))
| project TimeGenerated, Operation, Actor, ActorUPN, ActorIp, RoleName, RoleDefId, TargetIdentity, Permissions
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Defender XDR Unified RBAC (URBAC) changes — Last {TimeRange}

content.query:
fxdr_role_changes_normalized({TimeRange})
| where isnotempty(ActorIp)
| summarize Changes=count(), DistinctActors=dcount(ActorUPN), Roles=make_set(RoleName, 8), LastSeen=max(TimeGenerated) by ActorIp
| order by Changes desc
content.title: Role changes by source IP — Last {TimeRange}

content.query:
let actors = fxdr_role_changes_normalized({TimeRange}) | where isnotempty(ActorUPN) | distinct AUPN=tolower(ActorUPN);
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago({TimeRange})
| where tolower(UserPrincipalName) in (actors)
| summarize SignIns=count(), MFAUsed=countif(AuthenticationRequirement == "multiFactorAuthentication"), SingleFactor=countif(AuthenticationRequirement == "singleFactorAuthentication"), RiskySignIns=countif(RiskLevelDuringSignIn in ("high", "medium", "low")), AtRisk=countif(RiskState == "atRisk"), LastSignIn=max(TimeGenerated) by UserPrincipalName
| order by RiskySignIns desc, SingleFactor desc
content.title: Sign-in posture of role-change actors (MFA / risk) — Last {TimeRange}

content.query:
fxdr_role_changes_high_risk({TimeRange})
| project TimeGenerated, Provider, Operation, RoleName, Actor, ActorUPN, TargetIdentity, Result
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: High-Risk Role Changes by Unapproved Actors
